default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss client management strategies, standardize communication practices, and improve overall service delivery across GrowthX accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to establish clear, value-driven strategies for each client and consistently reinforce them](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Improve communication cadence and quality, focusing on building trust and demonstrating proactivity](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Implement a more structured approach to meetings, updates, and client interactions](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Empower team members to think critically and act with agency, moving beyond mechanical task execution](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Topics

### Client Strategy and Value Delivery

  - [Current issue: Lack of clarity on strategy and value delivery for each account](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Need for deeper understanding of client's business, audience, and goals](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Importance of setting clear priorities and communicating them effectively](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Example: Deep Graph engagement - 3 one-hour calls with technical teams to build relationship and understanding](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Communication and Reporting Standards

  - [Develop templates for meeting agendas, updates, and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Focus on demonstrating value and progress in every interaction](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Implement regular performance reporting (e.g., SEO metrics, content performance)](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Make information easily accessible (e.g., links to published articles, Airtable reports)](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

### Meeting Structure and Efficiency

  - [Rethink meeting frequency (e.g., bi-weekly for mature accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Use meeting time for relationship building and strategic discussions](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Prepare thoroughly before meetings, avoiding last-minute rushes](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Consider reducing CM presence in client meetings, focusing on director-led interactions](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### Team Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Directors should own accounts for the first 12 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
  - [MEs should focus on strategy and oversight, delegating execution to CMs](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)
  - [CMs should work behind the scenes, with MEs reviewing and approving their work](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [Consider specialization and rotation for CMs to build diverse skill sets](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)

### Content Quality and Strategy

  - [Aim for content that clients would be proud to send to their entire database](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Develop deep understanding of client's audience and subject matter](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Continuously improve content strategy based on performance and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Proactively identify areas for improvement (e.g., outdated content, image quality)](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Client Relationship Management

  - [Build rapport through personalized interactions and proactive communication](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Understand client's planning cycles and align with their internal processes](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Consider in-person meetings or office visits when possible](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Position the team as collaborative partners, not just service providers](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to create templates and standards for customer relationship management, updates, and meeting best practices](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [Develop a more polished off-boarding template and guidelines for email escalation](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2990.0)
  - [Update Client OS with current information by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Directors to take lead on client interactions for first 12 weeks of new engagements](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
  - [Implement new meeting structure focusing on director-led strategic discussions](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Create a centralized resource for training materials (e.g., Loom videos) for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/6c75rmUweWgMRsZUN4t1vbcD3Ci_nhzq?tab=summary&timestamp=4470.0)

action_items.description: Prioritize Smith AI account. Sync w/ Elvis, review feedback from last call, develop strategy recommendations.
Lead agenda/communication for Smith, GCAI accounts. Set up 1-on-1s w/ key stakeholders (e.g. Maddie from Smith AI).
Update client OS by end of day. Ensure accuracy, tag MEs to confirm.
Create "Wowser's doc" w/ proactive ideas to impress clients (e.g. regular site crawls, copyright checks).
Create templates/standards for customer updates, agendas, meeting best practices. Sync w/ MEs across pods, collect director thoughts. Include polished off-boarding template.
